description: Declarative, code-EXECUTED onboarding registry for the real-signal EEG pipeline. Unlike configs/btc_icft/*_real.yaml (which are documentation-only and are not parsed by any code), this file is loaded at runtime by sciencer_d/btc_icft/datasets/onboarding_registry.py and drives the generic streaming processor (tools/stream_process_openneuro_dataset.py) and the generic Level-M/Level-T CLIs. Adding a new OpenNeuro EEG dataset that fits the 'simple task-to-state map, one window per fixed interval' shape requires ONLY a new entry here -- zero new Python files. ds001787 is deliberately NOT here: its dual-mode/behavioral-file shape has its own dedicated modules (see level_m/ds001787_windows_real.py).
label_policy: task_to_state maps must be authored by a human from confirmed real BIDS task labels (list them via tools.discover_openneuro_tasks). Semantic state labels are NEVER auto-inferred from task-name strings -- structural discovery is automated, the mapping is not (no_label_inference guardrail).

ds005620.title: OpenNeuro propofol sedation EEG DS005620
ds005620.report_input_source: - Source: local BIDS inspection outputs or mock fixture mode.
report_extra_next_step_lines: - This is for future residual testing.
ds005620.format_note: EDF; propofol sedation; real BIDS task labels are awake/sed/sed2 (sed=77, sed2=49, awake=56 recordings) -- sed and sed2 both map to sedated per human decision (no_label_inference); the earlier {"sedated":"sedated"} key was a phantom that matched no real task and silently blanked every sedation window

ds003969.title: OpenNeuro meditation vs thinking EEG ds003969
ds003969.report_input_source: - Source: real BIDS EEG signal (meditation vs thinking blocks).

ds003816.title: OpenNeuro loving-kindness meditation EEG ds003816
ds003816.report_input_source: - Source: real BIDS EEG signal (loving-kindness meditation vs resting blocks).
ds003816.format_note: BrainVision .vhdr; 128ch actiCHamp 1000Hz; multiple ses-NN; VisualizeSelf/VisualizeOther intentionally unmapped

ds004148.title: OpenNeuro test-retest resting & cognitive-state EEG ds004148
ds004148.report_input_source: - Source: real BIDS EEG signal (eyes-open vs eyes-closed resting blocks).
ds004148.format_note: BrainVision .vhdr; CC0; multiple ses-session*; cognitive tasks (mathematic/memory/music) intentionally unmapped -- resting eyes contrast only

ds003800.title: OpenNeuro Auditory Gamma Entrainment EEG ds003800
ds003800.report_input_source: - Source: real BIDS EEG signal (auditory gamma entrainment vs rest blocks).

ds002338.title: OpenNeuro multi-modal motor-imagery neurofeedback EEG ds002338
ds002338.report_input_source: - Source: real BIDS EEG signal (motor-imagery pre vs post blocks).
ds002338.format_note: BrainVision .vhdr; CC0; other tasks (1dNF/eegNF/fmriNF/motorloc) intentionally unmapped -- MI pre/post contrast only

ds004572.title: OpenNeuro sham hypnosis EEG ds004572
ds004572.report_input_source: - Source: real BIDS EEG signal (pre/post-hypnosis-protocol baseline vs the four induced-experience blocks).
ds004572.format_note: BrainVision .vhdr; CC0; 64ch EasyCap standard_1020; induction1-4 (the induction period itself, a transition not a stable state) intentionally unmapped; the 2x2 real-vs-sham x hypnosis-vs-relaxation-label design that experience1-4 counterbalance across is not encoded in the task name and would need per-subject condition-order metadata to split further -- out of scope for the structural task_to_state map (no_label_inference)

ds005555.title: OpenNeuro Bitbrain Open Access Sleep (BOAS) full-night PSG EEG ds005555
ds005555.report_input_source: - Source: real BIDS EEG signal (PSG acq, human-expert-consensus AASM sleep-stage-scored 30s epochs).
report_extra_window_lines: - state_label is the dataset's own stage_hum consensus label (wake/n1/n2/n3/rem), read per-epoch from events.tsv -- not derived from a task-entity map (task_to_state is unused for this dataset; see sciencer_d/btc_icft/level_m/ds005555_windows_real.py).
ds005555.format_note: EDF; CC0; 6ch PSG 10-20 (F3/F4/C3/C4/O1/O2) + EOG/EMG/respiratory (excluded); acq-psg only (acq-headband, 2ch forehead, intentionally excluded); state comes from per-epoch events.tsv stage_hum (0=wake,1=n1,2=n2,3=n3,4=rem; 8=disconnection and -2=artifact excluded), NOT task_to_state -- requires the dedicated ds005555_windows_real.py windower, not the generic fixed-interval streaming path

ds004541.title: OpenNeuro multimodal EEG-fNIRS under general anesthesia ds004541
ds004541.report_input_source: - Source: real BIDS EEG signal (task-anesthesia; awake vs anesthetized intervals bounded by the real loc/roc consciousness-transition markers).
report_extra_window_lines: - state_label comes from the dataset's own loss-of-consciousness (loc) and recovery-of-consciousness (roc) event markers: awake = start->loc, anesthetized = loc->roc (or ->end); subjects with no loc marker yield no windows (no_label_inference). See sciencer_d/btc_icft/level_m/ds004541_windows_real.py.
ds004541.format_note: EDF; CC0; 58ch EEG 10-20 (standard names, no prefix) + fNIRS .snirf (fNIRS ignored, EEG-only path); non-contiguous subject IDs (sub-02,03,04,07,08,09,10,11 -- no 01/05/06); state from loc/roc events.tsv markers, NOT task_to_state -- requires the dedicated ds004541_windows_real.py windower; some subjects (e.g. sub-11) lack loc/roc and are skipped
